quests.name: Dragon Slayer
items: 3 map pieces (Melzar's Maze chest, Wormbrain the goblin, Dwarven Mines chest)
a ship (bought in Port Sarim) + Captain Ned, OR the Karamja-Crandor secret passage once found
antidragonbreathshield strongly recommended (sold by Oziach) - mitigates Elvarg's dragonfire but is not script-enforced as a hard block
quests.notes: Script-verified gate: dragon_journal.rs2:7 `if (%qp < 32)` blocks starting at the Champions' Guild - no quest or skill prerequisites, purely a QP threshold. This is THE central computation for the whole quest web: 62 other quests sum to 133 QP (quest.constant), so 32 is trivially reachable well before the endgame quests. Elvarg fight has no scripted level gate either - survivability is a judgment call for the player, not the engine.

quests.name: Fight Arena
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found (full script grep clean).

quests.name: Merlin's Crystal
items: Excalibur pieces fetched during the quest (do NOT hand out excalibur as a filler reward before this quest - arthur_journal.rs2:55 checks inv_total(inv, excalibur) and would let this sequence-skip)
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Feeds Heroes' Quest.

quests.name: Witch's House
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites (the stat(hitpoints) hits in-script are damage-percent calculations, not level gates).

quests.name: Biohazard
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Feeds Underground Pass. (Differs from OSRS canon, where Biohazard requires Plague City - not enforced in this script set.)

quests.name: Shield of Arrav
quests.notes: Single quest id represents BOTH resolution paths (Black Arm Gang or Phoenix Gang) - quest_blackarmgang.rs2 tracks %blackarmgang and %phoenixgang as alternate completion varps and Heroes' Quest accepts either (see hero.questsAny). No skill prerequisites for either path.

quests.name: Black Knights' Fortress
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Big Chompy Bird Hunting
quests.notes: chompybird_journal.rs2 gates completion on fletching>=5 (ogre bow ammo), cooking>=30 (chompy meat), ranged>=30 (hunting with the bow).

quests.name: Clock Tower
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Cook's Assistant
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Classic sphere-0 starter quest.

quests.name: Family Crest
items: one of the Family Crest gauntlets (cooking/goldsmithing/chaos) - vanilla forces a single choice per account
quests.notes: No hard skill prerequisites found - mining/smithing/crafting are used to CHOOSE which gauntlet to make, not to gate completion. Feeds Legends' Quest.

quests.name: Death Plateau
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Tourist Trap
quests.notes: desertrescue_journal.rs2 + quest_desertrescue.rs2 gate the punish-rock/dart-making steps on smithing>=20 and fletching>=10.

quests.name: Doric's Quest
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Druidic Ritual
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Nature Spirit
quests.notes: crafting>=18 is script-verified (druidspirit_journal.rs2:37, for repairing the urn). The Priest/Priest in Peril prerequisite is NOT a coded varp gate in this script set (era knowledge only, matching OSRS canon) - marking the quest chain as knowledge-tagged inside an otherwise script-verified entry.

quests.name: Monk's Friend
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Eadgar's Ruse
quests.notes: Full-directory grep found no coded %troll/%druid prerequisite varp checks, so no quest chain is modeled here even though OSRS canon lists Troll Stronghold as a requirement - this content set does not script-enforce it.

quests.name: Elemental Workshop
quests.notes: elemental_workshop_journal.rs2 + quest_elemental_workshop.rs2 gate on mining>=20, smithing>=20, crafting>=20.

quests.name: Plague City
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Fishing Contest
quests.notes: fishingcompo_journal.rs2 + hemenster_fishing.rs2 gate on fishing>=10.

quests.name: Gertrude's Cat
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Silent completion (null reward/message in send_quest_complete - the check/reward path still fires via the shared proc).

quests.name: Goblin Diplomacy
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Set on Karamja (goblin generals) - trivially reachable via the 30gp Port Sarim boat, noted per the travel-simplification convention.

quests.name: Holy Grail
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found (in particular, no %arthur reference - differs from later OSRS canon where Holy Grail requires Merlin's Crystal).

quests.name: The Grand Tree
quests.notes: grandtree_journal.rs2 + quest_grandtree.rs2 gate on agility>=25 (the tree-climbing obstacle course).

quests.name: Ernest the Chicken
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Hazeel Cult
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Heroes' Quest
quests.notes: Script-verified at quest_hero.rs2:1-6 (has_hero_quest_requirements proc): %qp>=55 AND Lost City complete AND Dragon Slayer complete AND Merlin's Crystal complete AND (Shield of Arrav complete via either faction). The questsAny entry is a formality here since blackarmgang already folds both factions into one id (see that entry's notes) - kept in the schema/engine as a real OR-group mechanism for future entries. Feeds Legends' Quest.

quests.name: Witch's Potion
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Horror from the Deep
quests.notes: The prayer>=50 checks in horror_godbook.rs2 gate blessing an unholy symbol (a bonus/reward-track feature), NOT the main quest completion path (send_quest_complete at horror.rs2:497 has no stat check upstream) - deliberately left out of the hard skills gate and noted instead.

quests.name: Pirate's Treasure
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Set on Karamja.

quests.name: Temple of Ikov
quests.notes: thieving>=42 in ikov_dungeon.rs2 is an OPTIONAL trap-disarm shortcut (ikov_traplever), not a hard block - the Fire Warrior can be fought instead. Deliberately left out of the hard skills gate.

quests.name: Imp Catcher
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Classic sphere-0 starter quest.

quests.name: The Digsite
quests.notes: itexam_journal.rs2 gates on agility>=10, herblore>=10, thieving>=25 (matches area_digsite.rs2/digsite_workman.rs2/itexam_chemistry.rs2 in-scene checks).

quests.name: Observatory Quest
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Silent completion (null reward/message).

quests.name: Watchtower
quests.notes: itwatchtower_journal.rs2 + ogre_potion.rs2/ogre_shaman.rs2/quest_itwatchtower.rs2 gate on magic>=14, mining>=40, herblore>=14, thieving>=15, agility>=25. Highest single-quest mining requirement outside the endgame chain.

quests.name: Jungle Potion
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Set on Karamja (Tai Bwo Wannai).

quests.name: Legends' Quest
quests.notes: Script-verified at legends_guard.rs2:50-53 (quest chain: crest+hero+zombiequeen+upass+waterfall all complete, AND %qp>=107) and legends_journal.rs2/quest_legends.rs2 (the ten skill gates, all hard `if (stat(x) < N) return/block` checks scattered through the Kharazi Jungle dungeon). The single most skill-demanding quest in the set - deliberately the capstone this simulator uses to prove skill-cap unlocks matter.

quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found (evil_monks.rs2's stat_base<=stat checks are anti-boost combat guards, not level gates). Opens Morytania/Canifis access.

quests.name: Regicide
quests.notes: Script-verified: regicide_kings_messenger.rs2:2 `if(%upass = ^upass_complete ...)` gates the quest start on Underground Pass complete. quest_regicide.rs2 has two agility checks (45 for an early obstacle, 56 for a later one - the higher value is the binding requirement) and crafting>=10 (poison-antidote work).

quests.notes: quest_troll.rs2 gates several obstacles on agility>=15.

quests.name: Underground Pass
quests.notes: Script-verified: quest_upass.rs2:81 `if(%biohazard < ^biohazard_complete)` gates the quest start on Biohazard complete. thieving>=50 gates a pickpocket obstacle (quest_upass.rs2:248). Feeds Regicide and Legends' Quest.

quests.name: Vampire Slayer
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found.

quests.name: Trials of the Fremmenik
items: viking_helmet (quest reward, also a wield-gate item)
quests.notes: viking_olaf.rs2 gates the boat-repair minigame on woodcutting>=40, crafting>=40, fletching>=25.

quests.name: Waterfall Quest
quests.notes: No skill/quest prerequisites found. Feeds Legends' Quest.

quests.name: Lost City
items: dramen_staff (the quest's own completion mechanic - NEVER hand this out as a filler reward, it would delete the quest's fetch step)
quests.notes: quest_zanaris.rs2:37,78 + zanaris_journal.rs2 gate on woodcutting>=36 (dramen branch) and crafting>=31 (lever mechanism). Opens Zanaris (fairy realm, reached via the dramen tree once the staff is crafted) and the Fairy Ring network in later revisions - not relevant to rev 274. Feeds Heroes' Quest.

quests.name: Shilo Village
quests.notes: quest_zombiequeen.rs2:390 gates on agility>=32 (rope swing). The crafting gate (line 789-793) is tool-dependent: chisel needs only crafting>=9, spade needs 29, default 19 - modeled at the lowest reachable value (9) since any of the three tools completes the same step. Feeds Legends' Quest.

meta.generatedNotes: QP values are script-verified against Server/content/scripts/general/configs/quest.constant (the single source of truth for every ^*_questpoints constant - 63 entries, sum 135). Skill/quest-chain requirements were established by grepping every quest's .rs2 scripts for stat_base/stat()/level checks (29 quests have skill gates) and for cross-quest _complete varp comparisons in each quest's main script AND its journal/guard files (found: hero, legends, upass, regicide, blackarmgang's two-faction fold). Absence of a hit is itself a verified claim (a full-directory grep found nothing), not an assumption - so 62/63 entries are 'script' verified; only druidspirit's quest-chain portion (Priest/Priest in Peril) falls back to era knowledge since no coded varp gate exists for it in this script set.
